title: Who's News: Strategic Appointments at Silicon Quantum Computing, Pasqal, JIJ, IQM Quantum Computers, IBM, and PostScriptum - Quantum Computing Report
gist: A roundup of strategic leadership moves across the quantum sector: Pasqal named a public-markets-experienced CFO ahead of its SPAC combination with Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. II, IQM closed its business combination with Real Asset Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: IQMX), and other hires at Silicon Quantum Computing, JIJ, IBM, and PostScriptum signal commercialization and go-to-market build-out.

insights.claim: Pasqal named Stephane Rougeot, a former CFO at publicly listed European firms including Deezer, Signify, and Technicolor, as Chief Financial Officer to manage financial operations, investor relations, and capital-markets strategy during its transition to public markets via a pending business combination with Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. II (Nasdaq: BBCQ).
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: Hiring a public-company CFO confirms Pasqal's SPAC listing is progressing; BBCQ is the ticker to watch for the completed combination.

insights.claim: IQM Quantum Computers finalized its business combination with Real Asset Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: IQMX), appointed Juho Sarvikas (CEO of Inseego) and Jeff Tuder to its board, bringing the board to seven members under continued chairman Sierk Potting.
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: IQM is now public via IQMX; a completed combination plus board build-out gives investors a listed European hardware pure-play to track.

insights.claim: Silicon Quantum Computing appointed Karna Nisewaner, former General Counsel at Cadence Design Systems with over 25 years in semiconductors and AI, as Chief Legal Officer to oversee corporate governance, IP portfolio, and regulatory compliance as it advances its atomic-precision silicon quantum roadmap.
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: A senior CLO hire signals SQC is hardening its IP and governance, often a precursor to fundraising, licensing, or a liquidity event.

insights.claim: JIJ Inc. expanded into the United States, hiring former Strangeworks executives Steven Gibson as President of Americas and Andrew J. Ochoa as Principal Solution Architect to lead commercial growth, hyperscaler partnerships, and delivery of its hybrid quantum-classical optimization software.
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: JIJ poaching Strangeworks leadership to open a US arm signals intensifying competition for hyperscaler and public-sector optimization deals.
insights.locator: JIJ Inc. has expanded its operations

insights.claim: IBM promoted Talia Gershon, a decade-long IBM hardware and cloud veteran, to VP and Chief Operating Officer of IBM Research and IBM Quantum, in an appointment announced by Jay Gambetta, VP of IBM Quantum.
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: Creating a COO role over IBM Research and Quantum suggests IBM is operationalizing and scaling its quantum unit toward execution and delivery.

insights.claim: PostScriptum appointed Antti Vasara, former President and CEO of VTT Technical Research Centre of Finland and Special Envoy for Technology to Finland's Foreign Minister, as VP of Quantum to direct a newly announced 30 million euro quantum investment strategy beginning with a stake in cryo-CMOS developer SemiQon.
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: A dedicated 30M-euro hardware-component fund with a named first deal in SemiQon flags fresh capital targeting the quantum control-electronics layer.
